content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.19%, Auto +2.14%, IT +1.33%, Realty +1.85%; VIX down 5.65% to 17. Book is +1.16% on the day with all 8 holdings green except GOLDBEES. Priority is locking in gains via SL trails on movers, not adding new exposure — book already 50% deployed and 5-day win rate is poor (14%, profit factor 0.4x), demanding discipline.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1039.68,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +7.8%. Current SL 1039.68 already above entry (locks ~5.7% gain). VWAP 1048 holding as intraday support. No-op MODIFY would be wasted; HOLDING SL here as it's already trailed appropriately. Switching to HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Down 2% as gold corrects on US-Iran de-escalation chatter. SL at 119 (3% below entry) intact. Holding as portfolio hedge — Fed decision pending could re-bid gold. No action."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.8% at 1452. Current SL 1438 already above entry — locking +1.7%. Stock at 52w high after stellar Q4 (PAT +27%). At ~+3% with SL above entry, mandate is to trail. However current SL already at breakeven+. HOLDING as already trailed. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry (breakeven). +0.8% so no further trail mandate yet. HOLDING. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 30,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "5.3x volume surge on M&A news ($11.75bn Organon deal — large leveraged acquisition with integration risk). MACD bearish crossover, intraday struggling at VWAP 1756, trading below SMA50 (1735). Risk-reward unattractive: SL 1742 only Rs 13 below CMP, target 1810 Rs 53 away (RR ~1:4 in WRONG direction). Better to book +1.3% gain and redeploy. Net: Rs 690 realized."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.50,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, SL already at 318.50 (just below entry). No trail mandate yet. HOLDING."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.8% at 482. Current SL 472 (above entry 469). Tightening SL to 475 to lock in ~1.3% gain. Stock at 52w high after Q4 results (+11% PAT, dividend Rs 5.25). VWAP 477.74 acting as support. Trail to 475 to protect profit while leaving room for momentum to play out toward 495 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 614.00,
      "new_target": 660.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.5%. Current SL 612 (entry). Tightening to 614 to lock +0.3%. Strong Q4 (PAT +68%), record date Apr 30 means stock will mechanically drop ~Rs 11 on Apr 30 — keeping SL at 614 above entry handles that adjustment. Bearish engulfing pattern on 23rd is concern, so tighter SL warranted. Target 660 intact on zinc strength."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1039.68,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +5.7% gain. Intraday holding above VWAP 1048. Let momentum play to target 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, SL intact, Fed decision could re-bid gold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at +1.8% above entry. 52w high momentum, target 1485 within reach."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven. P&L only +0.8%, no trail mandate triggered."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Volume surge looks distributive, MACD bearish, M&A integration risk on $11.75bn deal. Book small gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.50,
      "reasoning": "+0.3% only, SL at -0.6%. Let setup develop, summer demand catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to 475 (locks +1.3%) at 52w high; VWAP 477 as next support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 614.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten to 614 ahead of Apr 30 record date ex-dividend adjustment; protects gain."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GRSE: Strong Q4 + L1 status on Rs 33,000 cr corvette order is genuinely bullish, but stock is up 9.94% intraday with shooting-star intraday action (faded from 3339 to 3134). Wait for pullback to 2900-2950 zone (VWAP 3231 broken). BHARTIARTL: Q4 results today is event risk — wait for print before entry. MARUTI: Auto leadership intact but want a pullback. INTELLECT: Gap-up failed (opened 766, now 741), avoid chasing. PIRAMALFIN/RBLBANK: vertical moves on news, do not chase 52w highs. ITC: near 52w low with Q4 May 5 — interesting setup but wait for closer to results.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed with 8 positions and net +1.16% today. Two existing pending orders (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) still unfilled — leaving them as is for now. Per hysteresis rule, default disposition is NO new entries when >60% deployment imminent and 5-day stats poor (14% win rate, 0.4x profit factor). Focus this tick is entirely on capital preservation: SL tightening on COALINDIA and HINDZINC, EXIT on SUNPHARMA where volume surge looks like distribution post-M&A. After SUNPHARMA exit, ~Rs 52k cash freed but I'm NOT redeploying today — too many vertical-move stocks on watchlist (GRSE, PIRAMALFIN, RBLBANK at 52w highs) and book already concentrated in financials (PNBHOUSING) + energy/PSU (NTPC, COALINDIA, POWERGRID). Cluster check: NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA = ~30% of capital in PSU energy/utilities cluster — at the limit, no more PSU-energy adds."
}
